content:
🔮 Extra Credit = Unlockable Cosmetics

📜 Each extra credit assignment unlocks non-skill-based cosmetics:
✔ Complete a Creative Extra Credit → Unlocks a unique accessory or outfit.
✔ Participate in three extra credit assignments → Unlocks a rare color scheme.
✔ Complete every extra credit assignment → Unlocks a hidden, secret title.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages participation without affecting grading fairness.
• Gives players additional customization beyond just academic progression.
• Adds an element of hidden “secrets” for those who fully engage.

📆 2. Decision-Based Class Structure

🚀 Now, students have agency over how each day’s session unfolds.

📜 Three-Tiered Decision System:
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 48 (chunk 48/555)
